items.title: [Remoto] Fullstack Developer - Todos os níveis @ TKS
items.description:
<!--
==================================================
Caso a vaga for remoto durante a pandemia informar no texto "Remoto durante o covid"
==================================================
-->
<!-- 
==================================================
POR FAVOR, SÓ POSTE SE A VAGA FOR PARA BACK-END!

Não faça distinção de gênero no título da vaga.

Use: "Back-End Developer" ao invés de 
"Desenvolvedor Back-End" \o/

Exemplo: `[São Paulo] Back-End Developer @ NOME DA EMPRESA`
==================================================
-->
<!--
==================================================
Caso a vaga for remoto durante a pandemia deixar a linha abaixo
==================================================
-->

## Nossa empresa

A TKS (https://www.linkedin.com/company/tks-tech-knowledge-support) está em plena expansão e está com novas vagas para fazer parte deste time! Somos uma empresa de inovação, tecnologia e automação com foco em assumir os problemas de nossos clientes, solucioná-los e gerar valor aos processos.

Conheça nossa plataforma líder no mercado da saúde (www.beecare.app)

## Descrição da vaga

Fullstack Developer (Junior, Pleno, Senior) 

O profissional atuará com as seguintes tecnologias:

- PHP
- Banco de Dados
- Conhecimento em MVC
- Webservices
- API
- FrontEnd

## Local

100% Remoto

## Requisitos
Estamos procurando todos os níveis.  Com experiência e sem experiência

## Contratação

PJ

## Como se candidatar

Por favor envie um email para rh@tks-br.com com seu CV anexado - enviar no assunto: Vaga Fullstack Developer - Nível escolhido

## Tempo médio de feedbacks

Costumamos enviar feedbacks em até 05 dias após cada processo.
E-mail para contato em caso de não haver resposta: rh@tks-br.com

## Labels
Remoto, Fullstack, PHP

#### Alocação
- Remoto

#### Regime
- PJ

#### Nível
- Júnior
- Pleno
- Sênior

items.title: Technical Writer na Croct - Remoto
items.description:
**Excellent documentation begins with incredible people.**


If you work with technical documents for the engineering team and look for a startup with global potential, you'll like what we are offering for you.As a Technical Writer, you'll be responsible for translating ideas and technical information into intuitive and straightforward content. You'll work close to technology, product, design, and marketing teams, as well as Croct's founders.



As part of the job, you will:
> Ensure the delivery of ambitious projects with a significant impact on the business while working side-by-side with the Croct's founders.
> Plan, design, and keep the documentation updated for new and existing products
> Write and publish releases for developers.
> Understand customer needs and incoporate feedback into the documentation
> Ensure consistency of Croct's brand voice across all touchpoints.
> Write concise and easy-to-read English texts to guide the user through the documentation.
> Disseminate the documentation culture within the engineering team.


We are seeking:
> English fluency
> Experience with technical documentation production for the technology field.
> Interest in in-depth investigations for different subjects, to be able to translate abstract concepts into concise and accessible texts.
> Ability to communicate concepts visually, using graphics, diagrams, and othe visual aids.
> Ability to work with technology team.
> Experience with Javascript, Markdown, HTML and versioning tools (GitHub)


We are offering:
> Competitive salary
> Outsourced work
> Freedom to work anywhere
> Flexible working hours
> Growth opportunity in a startup with potential global scale
> Flexibility to work with the stack of your choice
> Work side-by-side with the founders and an incredible team
> Freedom to work and contribute to open source projects

https://croct.com/

Interessados enviar CV para jobs@croct.com

items.title: Website no longer updating; Travis needs migrating
items.description:
Hello,

I was looking into posting a job ad when I noticed the website was no longer updating, despite a new job being posted recently. I think this is because travis-ci.org has been retired, so the builds are no longer building.

However I believe open source projects are still supported for free at travis-ci.com and there's a migration guide here: https://docs.travis-ci.com/user/migrate/open-source-repository-migration 

Would one of the admins be able to look into that?

Thanks,
Dan.

items.description:
知名娛樂平台開發公司
徵：Software Engineer(Full Stack) （內湖）
薪資：面談＋＋＋＋

- 線上娛樂平台開發(以java程式開發為主) 
- 影音串流(streaming)服務 
- 即時交易系統 
- 其他相關應用軟體服務

上班時間9:00-18:00 / 10:00-19:00
提供專職廚師餐廳準備自助式早餐與午餐


工作內容:

- JAVA 開發, 具備前端頁面開發能力JS & jQuery 
- 按照BA需求開發並依照設計架構實作出對應功能 技能需求: 

● 具備Web程式設計經驗(必要)。

(1)Pure JAVA I.多執行序 II.排程 
(2)Ajax ● 資料庫程式開發經驗(Oracle or MySQL)。 
● 具備AP Server開發經驗(Tomcat)。 ● 具備JSP或Servlet(Java J2EE)程式開發經驗三年以上。 ● 配合專案的需求與職務指派，會有on call需要。 ●可加分的經驗： - 有performance tunning的經驗, 可以包含前端, 後端, 或DB - 熟悉Linux, 熟Redis佳 若您覺得目前未符合上列工作能力經驗，可額外提供下列資料給我們，將作為邀請面試的評估參考: (1)作品集 (2)課程心得 (3)概念性驗證(Proof of Concept；POC)

1. 維護現有 Java 產品，並依據業務需求調整系統。

items.description:
知名英文補教外商公司
上班地點:新北市板橋區文化路二段293號8樓（江子翠捷運站2號出口）

1.系統或服務模組代碼的編寫，自主進行功能單元測試
2.配合前端開發實現介面功能、確保交互介面具有良好的使用者體驗和卓越的性能
3.正確描述實際工作中遇到的問題，並提出改進建議

4.熟悉至少一種關聯式資料庫，如MS-SQL、MYSQL
5.熟悉Git Flow開發流程

items.title: [徵才][遠端/台北]Ubiquiti_Frontend Engeineer_前端工程師
items.description:
### **關於[Ubiquiti]** 


At [Ubiquiti Inc,.](https://www.ui.com/), we create technology platforms for Businesses, Smart Homes, and Internet Service Providers, driven by our goal to connect everyone, everywhere. To date, Ubiquiti has shipped over 100 million devices worldwide, from ISP networking products to the next generation of IT solutions. Our growth is made possible by the dedicated team of hundreds behind the scenes. From software developers and product managers to designers and strategists, Team UI is driven to achieve our common goal: Rethinking IT.

At Ubiquiti, you’ll heighten your potential and broaden your horizons, all while shaping the future of connectivity.

### **職缺要求**

Minimum Qualifications (MUST-haves) 
- Expert in HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES2015+), and React.
- Solid knowledge of programming, design patterns, web protocols, and web security.
- Ability to identify, analyze, and elaborate technical issues and provide solutions.
- An enthusiast of best practices. Understand profiling and web optimization.
- Good team player familiar with Scrum, Git, and Git flow.

Preferred Qualifications (Nice-to-haves / Plus) 
- Experience in NodeJS and other programming languages.
- Experience in redux, react-redux, and also side-effect managers like redux-thunk, react-saga, etc.
- Experience in TypeScript.
- Experience in styled-components.
- Experience in a testing framework like Jest, mocha, karma, etc.
- Experience in handling multimedia files.
- Experience in the UI of networking, mobile, and IoT devices.

### **薪資範圍**

NT$ 1,600,000以上 (年薪）

### **工作福利**

- 彈性上下班也可申請遠端WFH
- 免費午餐及水果
- 優於勞基法不扣薪事假病假
- 零食區全日免費提供飲品及美食
- 員工/眷屬團體保險及健檢
- 健身房補助

### **聯絡方式**
請至官網 [[Frontend engineer](https://careers.ui.com/apply/Frontend_Developer--dklOE1dIav)]投遞履歷或寄至hr.taiwan@ui.com

items.title: [全職遠端] [QuestDB] [年薪70-100K 英鎊] [Core Database Engineer] [Java / C++]
items.description:
## 團隊簡介/地點

QuestDB is the fastest open-source time-series database. The team is completely remote. 

## 工作內容

As a Core Database Engineer, you will bring your experience in design, development, and testing to improve our open source time series SQL database. You will continuously improve the system's performance, ensuring that QuestDB remains scalable and easy to use as we roll out new features built with C++ and Java (zero-GC). You will have the opportunity to interact with and gather feedback from QuestDB's growing community of users and contributors. You'll have the chance to work in an open and collaborative environment to improve user experience and the system's consistency along the way.

## 能力需求

- 全英文工作環境，聽說讀寫流利，可討論技術話題
- 3+ years of experience building data-centric software, writing and performance tuning data processing algorithms
- A BS in Computer Science or equivalent experience
- Proficiency in programming languages such as Core Java, C, or C++
- Good understanding of data structures, algorithms, OS inner-workings, and hardware
- Can-do attitude, good communication skills, empathy
- Solid experience working as part of a team, knowledge of git workflow, CI, and code review process

### 加分

- Cloud experience is a plus

## 薪資範圍

- 大約落在年薪七萬到十萬 英鎊，但不限於這個範圍
- 股票選擇權

## 工時/特休

- 彈性可談，年休一般是25起跳

## 聯絡方式

可線上申請
https://questdb.bamboohr.com/jobs/view.php?id=24&source=aWQ9MTM%3D
有問題也可以問我 https://www.linkedin.com/in/pei-wu/

items.description:
## 團隊簡介/地點
公司地點: 橙姑娘國際股份有限公司/高雄市左營區

對於每位公司夥伴的付出我們也非常珍惜，因此提供免費的午晚餐、不定期飲料零食、優異員工獎勵制度、生日禮金...等福利，另外我們公司組織架構扁平，工作授權度高，強調團隊合作並有話直說，若您是真誠負責、能力優秀、敢挑戰的人才，歡迎您加入成為同心努力的夥伴，一起成為更好的自己！

## 工作內容
1. 對區塊鏈技術相關應用架構有深入研究與強烈興趣
2. 參與區塊鏈應用的規劃與智能合約相關技術研究與開發
3. 基於區塊鏈的運行機制和底層平台之架構設計和應用
4. 開發基於區塊鏈技術的服務，包括後端協定/基礎架構/系統服務等相關應用

## 能力需求
1. 熟悉`Solidity`，編寫智能合約、智能合約框架
2. 熟悉`Web3.JS`與客戶端的應用程序介接

## 加分
1. 具備前端開發能力
2. 熟悉網路程式設計、資料結構、加密演算法與網路通訊協定
3. 熟悉分散儲存協議

## 福利
1. 免費員工餐（午餐／晚餐），廚師烹煮的美味餐點，晚餐可外帶回家吃
2. 免費飲料喝到飽
3. 多元化的升遷管道
4. 績效獎金、開工紅包
5. 生日禮金
6. 正式員工可每兩個月申請一次免費橙姑娘福利品
7. 不定期教育訓練

上面寫的是福利接下來要講重點了
我們很機車、很龜毛、很會要求、但我們也很疼惜人才、很敢給獎勵 。
如果有玻璃心的建議不要應徵，因為我們講話很直接
但我相信這樣才是最好的，有興趣想成為更好的人又不怕挑戰的話就加入我們吧！

## 聯絡方式
請將履歷寄送至hr@zygroup.com.tw 承辦人:劉小姐

items.title: [Remote/US] Front End / UI Elm Engineer
items.description:
Avetta is a rapidly growing SaaS software platform with over 100,000 clients. Their supply chain risk management and compliance software helps hundreds of global organizations to align their supply chains to sustainable business practices, worldwide. Their software saves lives by driving better safety practices in the workplace; implementing Avetta helped one major chemical company cut their accident rate by 74% in a single year!

They are seeking an experienced Frontend Elm Engineer to assist in the design, development, and release of new UI features for their Connect platform.

Want to connect quality and safety?

https://recruitcrm.io/apply/88664588

items.title: [Remote] Software developer @ Timelineapp
items.description:
Timelineapp is a service for the financial advisers (mostly in the UK) helping them to build and discuss investment strategies and retirement plans with their clients. Our front-end is almost 100% in Elm, the back-end is in Elixir (we use Phoenix framework), and a very important part has recently been rewritten in Rust. We’re looking for a person to develop both parts of the application (i.e., someone with full-stack capabilities and/or ambitions). Our development team is fully remote. 

More information and the link to apply is available in [the job posting](https://timelineapp.freshteam.com/jobs/-rhCfxf_dSVo/software-developer-software-engineer-remote).

items.title: 10up: Lead Front End Engineer
items.description:
![10up-Logo-2019](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/54147972/141860095-fd7b780c-a62c-4b63-8dfd-71410f84abbd.png)

_This role is fully remote and is open to applicants located anywhere around the globe._

Apply: https://10up.com/careers/lead-front-end-engineer/


Be a part of **something great**
**10up** is an award-winning full-service digital agency with a customer-centric service model and unrivaled leadership in open platforms and tools for digital makers and content creators. 10up’s services include user experience and interactive design, content strategy and creation, website and app engineering, SEO and online revenue strategy, and managed services. Our 250+ distributed team members provide end-to-end digital project expertise.

10up has a diverse client roster that includes Fortune 500 companies, influential content publishers, innovative startups, and impactful nonprofits. We’ve worked with some of the biggest names in the industry, such as Facebook, Google, Microsoft, Starbucks, ESPN, The New York Times Co., and Walmart.

10up has been leading the remote workforce movement for 10+ years. Our teams are distributed across six continents and 29 countries. All of our positions are fully remote (and always will be), and are open to applicants all around the world.

**Lead Web Engineers** have advanced knowledge of PHP and JavaScript and experience building large-scale performant applications. In addition to writing code, they are familiar with systems-level concepts. Lead Web Engineers being advanced in the skills of their discipline, they are also effective consultants and collaborators. They know how to balance a client’s needs, budget, and requirements. With knowledge of cutting edge techniques and an understanding of the constraints of scope and budget, a lead employee knows the possible ways to move forward and is able to select an appropriate technical approach for each client. A Lead Web Engineer is also expected to be a good communicator. They are skilled at providing actionable feedback and recommendations both internally to managers/teammates and externally to clients/vendors. Lead Web Engineers deliver successful projects by writing quality code, participating in important strategy conversations, and assisting with code reviews.

_This role is fully remote and is open to applicants located anywhere around the globe._

**Responsibilities**

- Lead front end implementations on large projects with complex requirements involving a team of engineers.
- Interpret designs and transform them into a polished rich cross-platform/device web experience.
- Write modular and performant HTML and CSS.
- Ability to make smart design decisions. Occasionally filling in gaps left by designers e.g. interpreting how a layout should be presented on small screens.
- Ability to rapidly prototype interfaces to finalize an experience in the browser as well as build long term scalable, maintainable, and performant production code.
- Visualize how a static design will be coded. Proactively flag challenging areas and offer alternatives, as well as identifying areas for greater code reuse.
- Ability to estimate work for a project and modularize goals into clearly defined, executable tasks.
- Ability to lead the front-end strategy for a project and make impactful decisions about the methodologies recommended to a client.
- Write JavaScript using industry best practices as well as React components. Ability to use modern JavaScript build tools like Webpack.
- Effectively collaborate with designers throughout the design and engineering process.

**Requirements**

- At least eight years experience with UI engineering, web development, web engineering, or a similar field.
- Project-level leadership experience e.g. leading a team of engineers to solve a complex problem.
- Experience providing code reviews, coaching, and mentorship to other engineers.
- Strong understanding of HTML and CSS including cross-browser compatibility and performance.
- Ability to write modern and performant JavaScript using latest technologies.
- Strong experience with the React JavaScript library.
- Strong experience using Git.
- Proven ability to transform a static comp into a website from the ground up.
- Understanding of ad implementations in a responsive environment.
- Experience in task runners and bundlers like Webpack or Gulp.
- Experience with coded style guides and creating highly componentized systems.
- Experience with  PHP, ideally in the context of WordPress themes.
- Being collaborative, self-motivated, and an "always-learning" person, excited to create great web experiences.

**Nice to have**

- Experience with Sketch or Design Software.
- Advanced understanding of as implementations in a responsive environment.
- Moderate PHP experience.
- Experience with Gutenberg and building out custom blocks.
- Design experience or formal design education.
- Remote working experience appreciated.
- Experience in mentoring and leading a team.
- Experience and expertise with third party integrations and client-side APIs.
- Strong ability to communicate with client stakeholders, both technical and non-technical, about the impact of decisions around markup approach, cross-platform responsive interactions, performance, and topics like accessibility and internationalization.
- Understand the high-level concepts behind modern JavaScript frameworks and can architect and execute project-work as needed.
- Code-based portfolio. Link us to your GitHub account, upload a .zip, or both (source files are helpful to get a sense of your code structure and file organization).
- Understanding of WCAG accessibility compliance. Ability to implement accessibility standards as well as audit existing websites.

---
tags: #frontend #lang-javascript #lang-php #level-lead #level-senior

items.description:
![10up-Logo-2019](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/54147972/141860095-fd7b780c-a62c-4b63-8dfd-71410f84abbd.png)

_This role is fully remote and is open to applicants located anywhere around the globe._

Apply: https://10up.com/careers/lead-web-engineer/

Be a part of **something great**
**10up** is an award-winning full-service digital agency with a customer-centric service model and unrivaled leadership in open platforms and tools for digital makers and content creators. 10up’s services include user experience and interactive design, content strategy and creation, website and app engineering, SEO and online revenue strategy, and managed services. Our 250+ distributed team members provide end-to-end digital project expertise.

10up has a diverse client roster that includes Fortune 500 companies, influential content publishers, innovative startups, and impactful nonprofits. We’ve worked with some of the biggest names in the industry, such as Facebook, Google, Microsoft, Starbucks, ESPN, The New York Times Co., and Walmart.

10up has been leading the remote workforce movement for 10+ years. Our teams are distributed across six continents and 29 countries. All of our positions are fully remote (and always will be), and are open to applicants all around the world.

**Lead Web Engineers** have advanced knowledge of PHP and JavaScript and experience building large-scale performant applications. In addition to writing code, they are familiar with systems-level concepts. Lead Web Engineers being advanced in the skills of their discipline, they are also effective consultants and collaborators. They know how to balance a client’s needs, budget, and requirements. With knowledge of cutting edge techniques and an understanding of the constraints of scope and budget, a lead employee knows the possible ways to move forward and is able to select an appropriate technical approach for each client. A Lead Web Engineer is also expected to be a good communicator. They are skilled at providing actionable feedback and recommendations both internally to managers/teammates and externally to clients/vendors. Lead Web Engineers deliver successful projects by writing quality code, participating in important strategy conversations, and assisting with code reviews.

_This role is fully remote and is open to applicants located anywhere around the globe._

**Responsibilities**

- Develop complex WordPress plugins and/or themes primarily using PHP.
- Mentor engineers and provide code reviews.
- Drive strategy and lead back end technical vision for large projects.
- Leverage WordPress APIs and extend the WordPress admin experience.
- Solve complex problems in simple ways.
- Solve bugs and address client issues in a fast-paced environment.
- Juggle current projects with incoming tasks.
- Respond directly to clients courteously and clearly.
- Solve client challenges with understanding and empathy.
- Test solutions across multiple browsers and platforms in a local testing environment.
- Deploy changes to live servers.
- Assist in the remediation, enhancement, and maintenance of client sites.

**Requirements**

- At least five years experience in back end focused web development.
- Expert skills in: PHP, JavaScript, React.js, jQuery, WordPress, HTML, CSS.
- Ability to expertly debug performance and caching issues.
- Code portfolio. Link us to your GitHub account, upload a .zip, or both.
- Experience using Git.
- Ability to setup a local environment for testing PHP code.
- Proficiency in verbal and written English.
- Ability to communicate professionally with technical and non-technical colleagues and clients.

**Nice to have**

- Agency experience
- Remote experience

---
tags: #backend #lang-javascript #lang-php #level-lead #level-senior

items.title: OneSecondDelivery: Machine learning dataset engineer for GPT scale ML project
items.description: **Tags:** #machine-learning #pytorch #tensorflow #computer-vision #ml #deep-learning #python #data-science #engineer **Published on:** October 31, 2021 **Original Job Post:** https://remoteOK.io/remote-jobs/106921-remote-machine-learning-dataset-engineer-for-gpt-scale-ml-project-oneseconddelivery ![](https://remoteOK.io/assets/img/jobs/f9f9673aadca1a2dc1d603f196c35ec01635705116.png) **Promising drone-delivery startup is hiring a Dataset and Machine Learning Manager to work remotely. OneSec is working on a groundbreaking GPT-scale machine learning project to make autonomous delivery drones. In this job, you will build the Datasets and Neural Networks that fly our autonomous delivery drones. These drones will then deliver millions of meals and other packages in the real world.** ##About OneSecondDelivery We are creating a food delivery app that uses autonomous drones to deliver the food. We deliver everything 5 times faster and 100 times cheaper, thanks to small autonomous delivery-robots. The company was founded in 2017 by a leading expert on drone legislation and a successful e-commerce entrepreneur. The Swiss Federal Institute of Technology’s Vice Presidency of Innovation has recognized the large potential of this project and has supported us with the XGrant Prize and other resources. ##Job Description OneSec is building one of the largest machine learning projects in the drone industry. With our own photorealistic flight simulator, and a fleet of prototype drones, we have built one of the largest 3d perception dataset in the world, and we are building a large computer cluster of NVIDIA and Tenstorrent chips to scale up our machine learning to GPT-Scale. ####Your job has 3 components: * Neural network training and optimization * Dataset management and generation * Supporting our hardware team in building up our exaflop-scale machine learning cluster ####Here are some of the Neural Networks you will be building: -Delivery surface finder: A neural net that picks the optimal delivery surface within a balcony or backyard of a customer. Usually this will be a table or chair or a section of the floor that has enough clearance. -OneSec Fruxel Depthmap: This is a convolutional neural network that takes camera images and generates a simple, but highly sophisticated vector representation of the space around the drone. Our pathplanner then uses this depthmap to plan a collision free path for the drone. -Visual Odometry Model: Our control system always needs an accurate understanding of how our drone is moving around from frame to frame. -Payload Positon tracker: While delivering the package, our control system needs to know how the package is sliding out of the payload bay. This model simply takes in the camera images and outputs the current location of the package. -Delivery Clearance Model: This model checks the camera images to see if the scene is safe to approach. We don't fly into a balcony if there's a human or dog in it. And when we approach a restaurant to pickup a package, we make sure the scene is clear of humans, pets etc. ###Requirements * The most important thing is that you are excited about this project, and like the mission of our company. * Highly knowledgeable about machine learning and neural networks. Both practical and theoretical. * Experience with computer vision and convolutional networks * Experience with PyTorch and TensorFlow * Good computer skills, and general tech savvy: you will do many tasks like setting up recording devices to record datasets, creating small python programs for dataset labelling and management, post processing large image datasets etc. * Computer programming experience in other areas is helpful Be sure to mention the words **AUTHOR EXCHANGE MARKET** when applying to show you read the job post completely. This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human. #Salary and compensation No salary data published by company so we estimated salary based on previous jobs related to . $20,000 — $100,000/year ### Location Eastern Europe, Latin America, South Asia, Middle East/africa
